sentence_reviews.text: Aligned modalities, simulators, and live streams provide richer context and interactive experience.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML multimodal/data context; domain randomization and sim-to-real references for simulation data; RT-2 reference for vision-language-action grounding.
sentence_reviews.notes: The sources support simulation and multimodal grounding, but 'live streams' and 'richer context and interactive experience' are broad claims not directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Multimodal, simulated & streaming data is to connect Datasets, sampling & splits, Images, video & spatial grids to downstream capabilities including Model-based reinforcement learning, Continual & online learning, Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Dreamer/world-model reference for model-based RL; domain-randomization and sim-to-real references for simulated data; PML data/representation context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Model-based RL and simulation links are supported. Continual/online learning and neuro-symbolic/physics-informed learning are not directly supported by the packet sources.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Dreamer learns world models from data for control; sim-to-real/domain-randomization references support simulated data in RL/robotics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Simulated and multimodal data can support model-based RL. 'Substrate for' is synthesized wording.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML provides general learning-from-data context, but packet evidence does not directly connect multimodal/simulated/streaming data to continual and online learning.
sentence_reviews.notes: Streaming data is plausibly relevant to online learning, but a direct source is needed for this exact claim.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Simulation references support synthetic/simulated environments but do not directly address neuro-symbolic or physics-informed learning.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited candidate sources do not support the exact downstream capability claim.

sentence_reviews.text: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Images, video & spatial grids.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML is relevant to data and representations but does not directly support this generic limitation.
sentence_reviews.notes: The limitation text is generic and is not supported exactly by the packet sources.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal, simulated & streaming data consumes, emits, or organizes information using Datasets, sampling & splits.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML data/sampling context; domain-randomization and sim-to-real references use simulation-generated datasets.
sentence_reviews.notes: The relation to datasets and sampling is defensible for multimodal/simulated data.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal, simulated & streaming data consumes, emits, or organizes information using Images, video & spatial grids.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: RT-2 vision-language-action reference and robotics simulation references use visual/spatial observations.
sentence_reviews.notes: Images/video/spatial observations are common modalities in simulated and multimodal learning, but not universal.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal, simulated & streaming data consumes, emits, or organizes information using Waveforms, audio & spectrograms.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML general multimodal/data context; packet candidate sources do not specifically support audio waveforms or spectrograms.
sentence_reviews.notes: Audio is a modality, but the packet evidence does not specifically justify this dependency.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal, simulated & streaming data consumes, emits, or organizes information using Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: RT-2 connects vision-language-action data; PML language/representation context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Language tokens can be one modality, but tokens/vocabularies are not intrinsic to all multimodal, simulated, or streaming data.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal, simulated & streaming data rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Distributed systems & networking.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDIA covers distributed data systems and streaming data infrastructure.
sentence_reviews.notes: Distributed systems are relevant for large-scale streaming/multimodal data infrastructure, but not required for the data type itself.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal, simulated & streaming data rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Dynamical systems & control theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Robotics simulation/sim-to-real and model-based control references involve dynamics/control settings.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dynamics/control is relevant for robotics simulation and model-based RL, but optional rather than inherent to all multimodal or streaming data.

edge_reviews.notes: Multimodal/simulated/streaming data is organized as datasets or streams; represents_with/core is defensible.
Visual/spatial data is a common but not universal modality; common represents_with is appropriate.
Audio is a possible modality, but the cited evidence does not establish it as common for this node.
Tokens are relevant for language modalities but not all multimodal/simulated/streaming data.
Distributed systems can support data infrastructure, but they are not a required conceptual dependency for all such data.
Dynamics/control is relevant to robotics simulation and model-based RL; optional strength is defensible.
